desc:

what do you man appreciate about a brand ? i.e when you see a brand other than the product what makes you invest into them (money & time) … not just fashion brands any type of brand ..
Came across this, what do we think?
fortify your mind. don’t move off emotion. emotion in this game gets you killed.
Up north they call it tea.
Play the cards you’re dealt. Some hands are better than others, but even the strongest hand won’t win if it’s not played right.
Strong minds suffer without complaining, weak minds complain without suffering … 🧏🏾‍♂️
One of my favourites, the story of the Chinese farmer reminds us to approach life with openness and to refrain from making hasty judgments about the events we encounter.
When everybody is digging for gold, sell shovels…
enjoy the international break, your mental health is important ❤️

hate to be that guy without both..
lonely at the top… LONELY LONELY LONELY 🥰
